title: Crispy Roasted Indian Chocolate Chips Stir-fry
description: A bitter, crispy post-workout dish featuring keto-friendly roasted chocolate chips as a unique twist on traditional Indian cuisine.
instructions: Melt the coconut oil in a small saucepan over low heat.
Mix in chocolate chips, almond flour, sea salt, fennel seeds, and black pepper until well combined. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Spread mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until edges turn golden brown.
Stir-fry roasted chocolate chips in a pan over medium-high heat with a small amount of olive oil, just to warm them up and break down some texture.
